title: centaurium erythraea subsp. bifrons
intro: Centaurium erythraea subsp. bifrons, also known as the lesser centaury, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the gentian family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent, which help to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing blood pressure and improving symptoms of insomnia and anxiety. The herbal preparations of Centaurium erythraea subsp. bifrons are typically in the form of dried flowers or extracts, often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
